---
title: "Simulación: sinusoide"
page-layout: full
---

Explora la señal

$$
x(t)=A\sin\!\bigl(2\pi f (t-t_0)+\phi\bigr)+b
$$

modificando amplitud, frecuencia, fase, desplazamiento vertical y desplazamiento temporal.

::: {.callout-note}
## Cómo leer los parámetros

- $A$ cambia la amplitud.
- $f$ cambia la cantidad de ciclos por unidad de tiempo.
- $\phi$ desplaza la fase.
- $b$ agrega un sesgo vertical.
- $t_0$ mueve la señal horizontalmente.
:::

::: {#sinusoid-sim .simulation-shell}
::: {.sim-card .sim-card--controls}
## Controles

<div class="control-grid">
<div class="control-field">
<label for="sinusoid-amplitude">Amplitud <em>A</em></label>
<div class="control-inline">
<input id="sinusoid-amplitude" type="range" min="0" max="3" step="0.1" value="1">
<input id="sinusoid-amplitude-number" type="number" min="0" max="3" step="0.1" value="1">
</div>
</div>
<div class="control-field">
<label for="sinusoid-frequency">Frecuencia <em>f</em></label>
<div class="control-inline">
<input id="sinusoid-frequency" type="range" min="0.25" max="6" step="0.05" value="1">
<input id="sinusoid-frequency-number" type="number" min="0.25" max="6" step="0.05" value="1">
</div>
</div>
<div class="control-field">
<label for="sinusoid-phase">Fase <em>&phi;</em> [rad]</label>
<div class="control-inline">
<input id="sinusoid-phase" type="range" min="-3.1416" max="3.1416" step="0.05" value="0">
<input id="sinusoid-phase-number" type="number" min="-3.1416" max="3.1416" step="0.05" value="0">
</div>
</div>
<div class="control-field">
<label for="sinusoid-bias">Sesgo vertical <em>b</em></label>
<div class="control-inline">
<input id="sinusoid-bias" type="range" min="-2" max="2" step="0.1" value="0">
<input id="sinusoid-bias-number" type="number" min="-2" max="2" step="0.1" value="0">
</div>
</div>
<div class="control-field">
<label for="sinusoid-shift">Desplazamiento temporal <em>t</em><sub>0</sub></label>
<div class="control-inline">
<input id="sinusoid-shift" type="range" min="-1.5" max="1.5" step="0.05" value="0">
<input id="sinusoid-shift-number" type="number" min="-1.5" max="1.5" step="0.05" value="0">
</div>
</div>
</div>
:::

::: {.sim-card .sim-card--plot}
## Gráfico

<div id="sinusoid-plot" class="plot-panel"></div>
:::

::: {.sim-card .sim-card--diagnostics}
## Fórmula actual

<div class="formula-panel" id="sinusoid-formula"></div>
<div class="metric-grid">
<div class="metric-card">
<span class="metric-label">Período</span>
<strong id="sinusoid-period"></strong>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<span class="metric-label">Frecuencia angular</span>
<strong id="sinusoid-omega"></strong>
</div>
</div>
<p class="sim-explainer" id="sinusoid-summary"></p>
:::
:::

<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.32.0.min.js"></script>
<script type="module" src="../assets/js/simulations/sinusoid-sim.js"></script>
